# qa56-..-..-etc-passwd-script-alert-t-script-Z-l-entry

# Heading with emoji 🔥💀

Plain text before the payload.

<script>window.__qa56_pwned = true; alert("pwned")</script>

<img src="x" onerror="window.__qa56_img_pwned=true;alert('img-xss')">

<iframe src="javascript:alert(1)"></iframe>

<a href="javascript:alert('href-xss')">click me</a>

<svg onload="alert('svg-xss')"><circle/></svg>
